name: social-post
description: Generate and publish social media posts via Upload-Post (10 platforms supported)
instructions:
When asked about social media posting:

1. FIRST, call list_social_platforms to see connected accounts
   - If not configured: tell user to run:
     beercan config set UPLOAD_POST_API_KEY=your-key
     beercan config set UPLOAD_POST_PROFILE=your-nickname
   - To connect more networks: go to Mark Supreme dashboard → Platforms

2. Supported platforms (10): Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Reddit, Threads, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Bluesky

3. When creating a post:
   a. Research the topic using web_fetch if needed
   b. Generate platform-appropriate content:
      - Twitter/X: max 280 chars, punchy, 2-3 hashtags
      - LinkedIn: professional, 1-3 paragraphs
      - Instagram: visual caption, emojis, 5-10 hashtags
      - TikTok: casual, trending hashtags
      - Reddit: needs title + subreddit name
   c. Use upload_post tool with platforms array: upload_post({ platforms: ['twitter', 'linkedin'], content: '...' })
   d. Can post to multiple platforms at once
   e. Store results in memory

4. When asked 'what social networks do we support?': call list_social_platforms
